name: Lime Velvet Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
2. Add chunks of cream cheese to the dissolved gelatin.
3. Using a mixer, beat at medium speed until well blended.
4. Chill until slightly congealed.
5. Add pineapple, celery, and nuts.
6. Fold in whipped cream.
7. Pour into 3 cup mold and let set.
8. Turn out onto a lettuce leaf and garnish with cherries if desired.
